leaderboard.top100Message: Top 100 players will share 10,000 $STRK when the Metacube is fully destroyed!
leaderboard.rankScoreFormula: Rank Score = cubes * 100 + coins - deaths * 2,000 + referrals * 40,000
leaderboard.mostAlignedEventDescription: Metacube: Most Aligned Event (ENDED) - Top 50 players share 2k $STRK.
leaderboard.fidelityWeekEventDescription: Fidelity Week Event (ENDED) - Top 40 players share 1,000 $STRK. Event occurred from Monday, April 14, 2025 at 8:00 PM to Sunday, April 20, 2025 at 8:00 PM.
leaderboard.referralDescription: Refer new players to Metacube! Both you and the referred player will earn 10,000 each once the referred player breaks 1,000 cubes.
leaderboard.connectWalletReferrals: Connect your wallet to view your referral link and stats.

upgrades.title: Upgrades
upgrades.miningRigDesc: Increase computational power for faster block mining.
upgrades.stakingDesc: Enhanced staking strategy boosts the value of your crypto rewards.
upgrades.walletDesc: Allows you to handle more attacks before getting rekt.
upgrades.networkDesc: Allows you to mine blocks from a farther location.
upgrades.caffeineDesc: Caffeine increase your energy level and recovery.
upgrades.proofOfLuckDesc: Boost your rig's chances of finding the right hash straight away.

walletNotDeployed.description: You must setup your account on-chain to play. You need STRK token to do it

issueVerifyingSignature.title: Issue verifying signature
issueVerifyingSignature.description: Issue verifying signature, if you just deployed your wallet, please wait a few minutes and try again.

wallet.guestIdWarning: WARNING: Your Guest ID is your account identifier. If leaked, anyone can access your account. Never share it with anyone!
wallet.linkRewardsWarning: If you want to receive your rewards and be eligible for potential airdrops and giveaways, click here to link a wallet.

referral.referralTooltip: Refer new players to earn 10,000 Metacube coins! Both you and the referred player earn rewards when they break 1,000 cubes.

walletDeploy.connecting: Hacking the mainframe... just kidding, connecting!
walletDeploy.strkTokensClaimed: STRK tokens claimed! Waiting for tokens to arrive...
walletDeploy.strkTokensReceived: STRK tokens received! Now deploy your wallet:
walletDeploy.clickToDeployAbove: Click the button above to deploy your wallet
walletDeploy.followInstructions: Follow the instructions to deploy your wallet
walletDeploy.authNote: Note: If authentication fails, please wait up to 30 seconds for your wallet deployment to fully propagate on-chain and try again.
walletDeploy.deploymentVerified: Wallet deployment verified! Now checking if it's fully propagated...
walletDeploy.checkingPropagation: Checking if wallet is ready to use...
walletDeploy.fullyPropagated: Wallet is fully propagated and ready to use!
walletDeploy.walletDeployedNotPropagated: Wallet is deployed but not yet fully propagated. Try authentication in 15-30 seconds.
walletDeploy.couldNotVerify: Could not verify wallet deployment. Please try again.
walletDeploy.waitingPropagationAttempts: Wallet deployed but waiting for network propagation... ({{attempts}} attempts left)
walletDeploy.walletNotPropagated: Wallet not yet fully propagated on the network. Please wait a few more seconds and try again.
walletDeploy.authFailed: Authentication failed. Please try again when your wallet is fully deployed on-chain.
walletDeploy.accountDeploymentRequired: Account deployment required. Please try the manual deployment option in your wallet extension.

bot.welcome: Welcome to Metacube! Type your message and press Enter to send.
bot.closeHint: To close the chat, press Enter on an empty field. Reopen it with Enter again.
bot.respectWarning: ⚠️ Slurs are not tolerated here and can result in a ban. Keep our community positive and respectful. ⚠️

confirmTransition.title: Confirm Transition
confirmTransition.message: Are you sure you want to post the transition? This action cannot be undone.

cube.message1: One cube to rule them all, but a legion of Stove Troopers to break it.
cube.message3: Watch out, Metacube, I've got the hammer of decentralization.
cube.message4: Don't get block-chained down, break the cube!
cube.message5: Dismantling the cube, one layer at a time.
cube.message6: Metacube's about to get a block-buster hit!
cube.message7: Fly, you stoves! And dismantle the Metacube!

welcome.title: Welcome to Metacube
welcome.message: Greetings, Stove Trooper! Your mission is clear: destroy the Metacube using your troops. Hunt for NFTs, break the cubes, and remember—this is a unique event. Once the Metacube is destroyed, it's over forever. Good luck!

cubeDamage.title: Cube Defense Mechanism
cubeDamage.message: Watch out for the flickering pixels on the cubes! Those represent concentrated Metacube energy. Hitting them will trigger a powerful counterattack. Aim carefully!

fallDamage.title: Mind the Gravity
fallDamage.message: Falling too fast can cause serious damage! Slow down before hitting the ground, and don't pull a 'Luna' by taking a reckless dive.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Time!
upgrade.message: Congratulations! You've gathered enough funds to purchase your first upgrade. Choose wisely and strengthen your arsenal!

fisc.title: Beware of Tax Advisors!
fisc.message: Tax advisors are out to steal your hard-earned Metacoins! They won't hesitate to tax you into oblivion. Evade them or smash them with your hammer before they reach you.
